AgentaNodeDto.title: AgentaNodeDto
AgentaNodeDto.description:
SDK-internal type for inline trace node representation.

This type accepts arbitrary fields via extra="allow" since it's
constructed from span dictionaries with dynamic keys.

AgentaNodesResponse.title: AgentaNodesResponse
AgentaNodesResponse.description: SDK-internal type for inline trace response.

default.system_prompt: You are an expert in geography

model.title: Model
model.description: ID of the model to use

temperature.title: Temperature
temperature.description: What sampling temperature to use, between 0 and 2. Higher values like 0.8 will make the output more random, while lower values like 0.2 will make it more focused and deterministic

max_tokens.title: Max Tokens
max_tokens.description: The maximum number of tokens that can be generated in the chat completion

top_p.title: Top P
top_p.description: An alternative to sampling with temperature, called nucleus sampling, where the model considers the results of the tokens with top_p probability mass

frequency_penalty.title: Frequency Penalty
frequency_penalty.description: Number between -2.0 and 2.0. Positive values penalize new tokens based on their existing frequency in the text so far

presence_penalty.title: Presence Penalty
presence_penalty.description: Number between -2.0 and 2.0. Positive values penalize new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far

reasoning_effort.title: Reasoning Effort
reasoning_effort.description: Controls the reasoning effort for thinking models. Options: 'none' (cost-optimized, 0 tokens), 'low' (1024 tokens), 'medium' (2048 tokens), 'high' (4096 tokens)

response_format.title: Response Format
response_format.description: An object specifying the format that the model must output

stream.title: Stream
stream.description: If set, partial message deltas will be sent

tools.title: Tools
tools.description: A list of tools the model may call. Currently, only functions are supported as a tool

tool_choice.title: Tool Choice
tool_choice.description: Controls which (if any) tool is called by the model

template_format.title: Template Format
template_format.description: Format type for template variables: fstring {var}, jinja2 {{ var }}, or curly {{var}}

input_keys.title: Input Keys
input_keys.description: Optional list of input keys for validation. If not provided, any inputs will be accepted

PromptTemplate.title: PromptTemplate
PromptTemplate.description: A template for generating prompts with formatting capabilities
